Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Abusing Customizable Selects 129 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Log File Viewer for the Terminal 177 upvotes, 23 comments
  3. IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port 78 upvotes, 10 comments
  4. A 6502 disassembler with a TUI: A modern take on Regenerator 49 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. Autoresearch on an old research idea 376 upvotes, 83 comments
  6. Gerd Faltings, who proved the Mordell conjecture, wins the Abel Prize 45 upvotes, 6 comments
  7. MSA: Memory Sparse Attention 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. Claude Code Cheat Sheet 448 upvotes, 132 comments
  9. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 221 upvotes, 60 comments
  10. Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun' 85 upvotes, 22 comments
  11. Box of Secrets: Discreetly modding an apartment intercom to work with Apple Home 168 upvotes, 53 comments
  12. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 215 upvotes, 73 comments
  13. BIO – The Bao I/O Co-Processor 52 upvotes, 13 comments
  14. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 174 upvotes, 67 comments
  15. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 638 upvotes, 284 comments
  16. Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents 158 upvotes, 63 comments
  17. ICE: $45 an Hour to Stand There. TSA: $0 an Hour to Keep You Safe 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Debunking Zswap and Zram Myths 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. An incoherent Rust 208 upvotes, 110 comments
  20. Ripgrep is faster than grep, ag, git grep, ucg, pt, sift (2016) 91 upvotes, 43 comments
  21. Opera: Rewind The Web to 1996 (Opera at 30) 78 upvotes, 38 comments
  22. curl > /dev/sda: How I made a Linux distro that runs wget | dd 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers 346 upvotes, 232 comments
  24. Microsoft's "Fix" for Windows 11: Flowers After the Beating 225 upvotes, 170 comments
  25. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 294 upvotes, 295 comments
  26. No-build, no-NPM, SSR-first JavaScript framework if you hate React, love HTML 41 upvotes, 33 comments
  27. What makes time-series database KDB-X so fast? 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Microservices and the First Law of Distributed Objects (2014) 23 upvotes, 16 comments
  29. MagicAudio – Free Noise, Echo and Background Music Remover 13 upvotes, 8 comments
  30. The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M 95 upvotes, 138 comments

Last generated 8:00pm, 24 March 2026. Source here.
